label: weak

card.title: parseQuery() query-string parser
card.description: Parse a URL query string into an object for the router.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed. Decode keys/values, support repeated keys as arrays, handle leading '?'. Tested.
isc: Exports parseQuery(qs) returning an object of decoded key/value pairs
Repeated keys are collected into an array
Tests cover decoding, repeated keys, and the leading '?'

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports parseQuery(qs) returning an object of decoded key/value pairs
Repeated keys are collected into an array
Tests cover decoding, repeated keys, and the leading '?'
